steps.title: Name what was confirmed
steps.content: Astronomers used calculations and models in the 1990s to predict that certain collisions could release massive bursts of gamma rays. Observations in 2017 later confirmed that scientific prediction.

steps.title: Choose the scientific label
steps.content: B is wrong because evidence confirms a claim; it is not what was confirmed. C is unrelated to a predicted event, and D would name a procedure rather than the modeled explanation. The word for a proposed scientific explanation or prediction fits. The answer is A.
